data.description:
## What
Remove the PROJECT_ROOT env var (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT; hard-remove per env-var review decision var 2). Slice of EV-2 / 77aa. REBAR_ROOT remains the single repo-root override, so behavior is preserved for anyone already using REBAR_ROOT.

## Scope / Deliverables
- Drop ' or os.environ.get("PROJECT_ROOT")' at the ~23 src read sites: config.py repo_root, _engine_support/reads.py (also fix its reversed PROJECT_ROOT-before-REBAR_ROOT order), _cli/_init.py, _commands/txn.py + init.py, and _engine/rebar_reconciler/* (apply_planning, health, applier, rebar_id_audit, inbound_translate, batch_dispatch, apply_inbound, reconcile, fetcher, invariants, __main__).
- Remove PROJECT_ROOT from config._env_signature.
- Migrate the ~14 test files that set PROJECT_ROOT to REBAR_ROOT.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No os.environ read of PROJECT_ROOT remains in src (REBAR_ROOT only)
- [ ] reads.py root resolution honors REBAR_ROOT consistently (reversed-order site fixed)
- [ ] Tests migrated to REBAR_ROOT; full non-integration suite green
data.title: EV-2a: remove PROJECT_ROOT env var (REBAR_ROOT only)
